citation.description: Lines 139-147 name the Backend facade and five role Protocols (TicketTransport, OutboundMapper, InboundMapper, FieldSanitizer, IdentityConvention). Line 155 defines RemoteRef{vendor, instance, remote_id}. Line 161 states the registry keyed on config.reconciler.backend.

criteria.criterion: §(d) names all five role Protocols, the `Backend` facade, `RemoteRef`, and the registry keyed on `config.reconciler.backend` — verified by reading the rendered section.

citation.description: Lines 125-130 state rebar's own ticket is the canonical model with no separate CanonicalTicket. Lines 166-169 enumerate all three leak-fixes: (i) ADF size-fitting + lossy status/parent value rules, (ii) duplicated priority/status value-maps, (iii) outbound_links link-relation constant single-sourced under adapters/jira/.

criteria.criterion: The ADR states the canonical model is rebar's own ticket (no separate model) and lists the three leak-fixes (ADF-sizing out of the differ, lossy-status/parent rules into the Jira adapter, duplicated value-maps/link-constants single-sourced) — verified by grep for those terms in the file.

citation.description: Status line (lines 3-4) references epic bbf1-82e1-cf9d-494a. Line 174 in the proof-of-seam paragraph scopes the first real second backend (GitHub adapter) to epic be74-7832-03a8-48ac.

criteria.criterion: The Status line references epic `bbf1`; the proof-of-seam scopes the first real second backend to epic `be74` — verified by reading.

citation.description: make lint runs ruff (Python), ruff format --check (Python), DCO identity check (Python scripts), zizmor (YAML), and actionlint (YAML workflows). None of these tools process .md files, so a docs-only change to 0035-reconciler-vendor-adapter-seam.md cannot introduce a lint error. No mechanism exists by which this change would cause make lint to fail.

criteria.criterion: `make lint` passes on the branch (docs-only change introduces no lint error).
